name: Cajun Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Combine all ingredients for the cake in a large bowl. Pour the batter into a greased, floured 10-inch tube pan. Bake for 45-50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Do not remove the cake from the pan until it is ready to be glazed.
Cajun Pound Cake Glaze: In a small saucepan, cook the cocoa, water, margarine, and corn syrup until the margarine is melted. Add the confectioner's sugar and stir until smooth. Pour the glaze over the warm cake and let cool before serving.
